content.full_text:
March 10, 1900

Mr. Kirk Alan Pessner
Dobbs and Nielsen
Suite 2500, The Alcoa Building
One Maritime Plaza
San Francisco, California 94111

Dear Kirk:

Thank you for your letter of February 26, 1900, memorializing
our telephone conversation of the same date concerning 35 day
post-qualification reports. You have correctly stated the advice
I gave you at that time.

Sincerely,

John Giansello
Political Reform Analyst

JG:bw

A-80-03-016

6/2000

DOBBS & NIELSEN
Attorneys and Counselors at Law

SUITE 2500, THE ALCOA BUILDING
ONE MARITIME PLAZA
SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111

TELEPHONE (415) 362-1940

February 26, 1980


Mr. John Giansello
Fair Political Practices Commission
Technical Assistance Division
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95807

Re: 35 day post-qualification report

Dear John:

     This will confirm our telephone conversation of today regarding the 35 day post-initiative qualification reports by major donors. In our conversation you made the following statements:

     1. If a major donor filer had reported con-
tributions toward the qualification of
the initiative, on its semi-annual campaign
statement for 1979, the period covered by
the abbreviated campaign statement filed
in connection with the 35 day post-initiative
qualification report would cover the period
from January 1, 1980 through the 28th day
after notification.

     2. If contributions had been made toward the
qualification of the initiative in the
previous calendar year, the abbreviated
campaign statement for the 35 day post-
initiative qualification filing would show
on the front page a cumulative figure re-
flecting total expenditures to date.

     If I have misrepresented your advice, please advise me at your earliest convenience.

                                   Kind regards,


                                   Kirk Alan Pessner
                                   Paralegal

KAP:dml

SACRAMENTO OFFICE - SUITE 550, 1225 EIGHTH STREET, SACRAMENTO, CA 95814 • (916) 446-6752
LOS ANGELES OFFICE - SUITE 309, 612 SOUTH FLOWER STREET, LOS ANGELES, CA 90017 • (213) 628-5867
